info.title: fsdgenpython
info.description: A tool that generates Python for a Facility Service Definition.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Generates Markdown for a Facility Service Definition.

options.name: --clean
options.description: Deletes previously generated files that are no longer used.

options.name: --indent
options.description: The indent used in the output: a tab or a number of spaces.

options.name: --newline
options.description: The newline used in the output.

options.name: --exclude-tag
options.description: Excludes service elements with the specified tag.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Executes the tool without making changes to the file system.

options.name: --verify
options.description: Exits with error code 1 if changes to the file system are needed.
